text:

Author: bdrewery

Log:
  MFH: r475282

  vboxheadless: Fix start of specific machine after base r291770.

  The vboxheadless rc script has its own pid checking, so the rc.subr
  version in run_rc_command is not needed.

  Approved by:	portmgr (implicit)
